title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.420 - Circuit clerk, office (Cape Girardeau County)
text:
483.420.  Circuit clerk, office (Cape Girardeau County). — The circuit clerk of Cape Girardeau County may maintain and staff offices at the courthouses in Jackson and Cape Girardeau.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 2011 H.B. 340)
